_comment: Router + state map for design-creator (v2.1.1). The engine reads this FIRST. It exists to fight context rot: load only the files a task needs, keep the invariants near the work, and keep durable state out of the chat. See principles/invariants.md.
reinjection_rule: Re-read principles/invariants.md (a) at the start of each generation stage, (b) immediately before writing code for any section, and (c) at the top of every design-QA gate run. The invariants are short by design so this is cheap. Never rely on having 'already read them earlier' in a long session.

task_routes._comment: Lazy loading. Load ONLY the bucket for the current task plus always_first + axis_setup. Do not pull every principle into context.

contextual_load._comment: Principles pulled ON DEMAND by trigger — NOT auto-loaded with the buckets above (loading them every time would defeat progressive disclosure). Listed here so the router is a COMPLETE manifest of the principles/ surface: tools/drift.mjs check fails if a principles/*.md is absent from this file. Pull each only when its trigger fires.
contextual_load.principles/responsive.md: any multi-breakpoint layout work (almost always in generation)
contextual_load.principles/accessibility.md: interactive UI — focus order, ARIA, contrast (pair with interaction-detail)
contextual_load.principles/screen-states.md: designing empty / error / loading / success states
contextual_load.principles/frontend-safety.md: before shipping real code — unsafe HTML sinks, injection surfaces
contextual_load.principles/optimization.md: asset / bundle weight matters (pairs with perf-budget.md)
contextual_load.principles/micro-mechanics.md: finishing hover / press / focus mechanics on a section
contextual_load.principles/theming.md: multi-theme or theme-token work (default two themes ⇒ usually on)

state_files._comment: Durable state lives in files, not in the conversation. Re-read on demand; do not try to remember these across a long session. See principles/invariants.md (#externalize).
state_files.token_contract: .design/tokens.json (the bridge spec; this one is COMMITTED, not gitignored)
state_files.sameness_ledger: .design/ledger.json (used hooks/archetypes/palettes; soft inertia-repeat flag + favorites pin; spread.mjs reads/writes spread[] + pins[])
state_files.spread_log: .design/spread-log.jsonl (append-only log of chosen archetype×mechanism cell + novelty percentile per build; read by evals/diversity.mjs to measure real output spread)
state_files.project_rules: CLAUDE.md (stack, file-length limit, folder layout) and .design/rules/
state_files.taste_profile_owner: ~/.claude/design-taste.json (owner-global preferences; advisory, never overrides the floor)
state_files.aesthetic_calibration: .design/calibration.jsonl (engine in-tier prediction vs owner reaction; read via tools/calibration.mjs)
state_files.user_refs: .design/refs/ (user-dropped reference URLs/screenshots; read first by reference-scout)

gitignore_policy: Gitignore only bulky mockup iterations under .design/mockups/. The token contract (.design/tokens.json), the journal, and any committed design rules are NOT gitignored — they are the source of truth for Stage 3, design-QA, CI, and teammates.
